sections.label: Administrative Information
evidence: ission 02-27-2026 Admission Info Admission Packets Calendar Insurance/Payer Diagnosis Physicians Care Team Documentations AllPhysician OrdersVisit NotesOASISCommunication NotesOther Notes Care Plan Summary Plan of Care Medication AllSnapsho
suggestions: Confirm demographic and payer fields against referral/intake artifacts.
Use shared referral/hospital evidence before escalating any diagnosis changes to coding.

sections.label: Vital Signs
suggestions: Check whether visit notes contain vitals that can support missing fields.
Use shared referral/hospital evidence before escalating any diagnosis changes to coding.

sections.label: Pain Assessment
suggestions: Review clinician notes for pain frequency, scale, and location details.
Use shared referral/hospital evidence before escalating any diagnosis changes to coding.

sections.label: Medications and Allergies

suggestions: Check referral and hospital documents for medication, allergy, and special-treatment references.
Use shared referral/hospital evidence before escalating any diagnosis changes to coding.
